prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is Calibration, part of the Instrumentation & Controls scope. The observed field condition is: as-found/as-left not recorded. The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: ISA standards, site QC. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Calibration (industrial site)
